---
pagetitle: "FIMS"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/index.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://sibforms.com/forms/end-form/build/sib-styles.css">
  <script src="assets/scripts.js" defer></script>
  <script defer src="https://sibforms.com/forms/end-form/build/main.js"></script>
resources:
  - assets/index.css
  - images/case_study.jpg
  - images/contribution.jpg
  - images/training.png
  - images/FIMS_logo3.png
---

```{=html}
<div class="site-hero mb-5">
  <div class="site-intro">
    <h1 class="site-title text-primary mt-0 fw-lighter text-center text-sm-start">
      NOAA Fisheries Integrated Modeling System
    </h1>

    <div class="social-icon-links my-3">
      <a
        class="link-primary"
        href="https://github.com/NOAA-FIMS"
        title="FIMS on GitHub"
        aria-label="Visit FIMS on GitHub"
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener"
      >
        <i class="fab fa-github fa-lg fa-fw" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      </a>

      <a
        class="link-primary"
        href="https://noaa-fisheries-integrated-toolbox.r-universe.dev"
        title="FIMS R Universe"
        aria-label="Visit FIMS R Universe repository"
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener"
      >
        <i class="fab fa-r-project fa-lg fa-fw" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      </a>

      <a
        class="link-primary"
        href="https://nmfs-ost.github.io/noaa-fit/"
        title="NOAA Fisheries Integrated Toolbox"
        aria-label="Visit NOAA Fisheries Integrated Toolbox"
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener"
      >
        <i class="fa fa-briefcase fa-lg fa-fw" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      </a>
    </div>

    <p class="site-intro fs-5">
      Welcome to the <strong>Fisheries Integrated Modeling System (FIMS)</strong> community playbook, your source of information for all members of the FIMS community--developers, users, and receivers of stock assessments. We welcome both those that are new and seasoned to the field to join us as we work to fulfill our <a href="about/index.qmd#mission">mission</a>!
    </p>
    <a class="mt4 action text" href="about/index.qmd">See the <strong>overview page</strong> for more! →</a>
  </div>

  <div class="site-logo">
    <img src="images/FIMS_logo3.png" alt="FIMS half page logo">
  </div>
</div>
```
## Subscribe to the FIMS Weekly Newsletter and Blog

```{=html}
<div class="sib-form" style="text-align: center; background-color: #c6e6f0; padding: 15px 0;">
  <div id="sib-form-container" class="sib-form-container">
    <div id="error-message" class="sib-form-message-panel" role="alert" aria-live="assertive" tabindex="-1" style="font-family:Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size:16px; text-align:left; color:#661d1d; background-color:#ffeded; border-color:#ff4949; border-radius:3px; max-width:350px; margin: 0 auto;">
      <div class="sib-form-message-panel__text sib-form-message-panel__text--center">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 512 512" class="sib-icon sib-notification__icon" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M256 40c118.621 0 216 96.075 216 216 0 119.291-96.61 216-216 216-119.244 0-216-96.562-216-216 0-119.203 96.602-216 216-216m0-32C119.043 8 8 119.083 8 256c0 136.997 111.043 248 248 248s248-111.003 248-248C504 119.083 392.957 8 256 8zm-11.49 120h22.979c6.823 0 12.274 5.682 11.99 12.5l-7 168c-.268 6.428-5.556 11.5-11.99 11.5h-8.979c-6.433 0-11.722-5.073-11.99-11.5l-7-168c-.283-6.818 5.167-12.5 11.99-12.5zM256 340c-15.464 0-28 12.536-28 28s12.536 28 28 28 28-12.536 28-28-12.536-28-28-28z" />
        </svg>
        <span class="sib-form-message-panel__inner-text">
          Your subscription could not be saved. Please try again.
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div id="success-message" class="sib-form-message-panel" role="status" aria-live="polite" tabindex="-1" style="font-family:Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size:16px; text-align:left; color:#085229; background-color:#e7faf0; border-color:#13ce66; border-radius:3px; max-width:350px; margin: 0 auto;">
      <div class="sib-form-message-panel__text sib-form-message-panel__text--center">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 512 512" class="sib-icon sib-notification__icon" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M256 8C119.033 8 8 119.033 8 256s111.033 248 248 248 248-111.033 248-248S392.967 8 256 8zm0 464c-118.664 0-216-96.055-216-216 0-118.663 96.055-216 216-216 118.664 0 216 96.055 216 216 0 118.663-96.055 216-216 216zm141.63-274.961L217.15 376.071c-4.705 4.667-12.303 4.637-16.97-.068l-85.878-86.572c-4.667-4.705-4.637-12.303.068-16.97l8.52-8.451c4.705-4.667 12.303-4.637 16.97.068l68.976 69.533 163.441-162.13c4.705-4.667 12.303-4.637 16.97.068l8.451 8.52c4.668 4.705 4.637 12.303-.068 16.97z" />
        </svg>
        <span class="sib-form-message-panel__inner-text">
          Your subscription to the Fisheries Integrated Modeling System Blog was successful. Welcome to the FIMS Blog :)
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <section id="sib-container" class="sib-container--large sib-container--vertical" aria-labelledby="newsletter-form-title" aria-describedby="newsletter-form-description" style="padding: 15px 20px !important; max-width:450px; margin: 0 auto; text-align:center; background-color:rgba(255,255,255,1); border-width:1px; border-style:solid; border-color:#C0CCD9; border-radius:3px; direction:ltr">
      <form id="sib-form" method="POST" action="https://11796369.sibforms.com/serve/MUIFAK1XHMwXI2NT4stSrUOqzvk_N5p9vPeHoF3BCI1dgjJSFy-EiOCNK2tgyvJhpXso6jQu_TUclmZ1Aa5uESA9g4gzTrFel9mghDTJkgPDD-DVijIa3ax16iCbdvK3w8erhPbeNYuoUY-boD64ojPldsu0VNBEO-20emT2pQmH87NHI2-9D0wyZhyXf5mMWYmOUD89fvcHbFeQRQ==" data-type="subscription">
        <fieldset class="sib-form-fieldset">
          <legend class="visually-hidden">Subscribe to the FIMS Blog newsletter</legend>

          <div style="padding: 2px 0;">
            <div class="sib-form-block" style="font-family:Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size:24px; font-weight:700; text-align:left; text-decoration:underline; color:#113d77; background-color:transparent;">
              <p id="newsletter-form-title" style="margin: 0; margin-bottom: 2px;">FIMS Blog</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div style="padding: 2px 0; margin-bottom: 10px;">
            <div class="sib-form-block" style="font-family:Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size:14px; text-align:left; color:#3C4858; background-color:transparent;">
              <div class="sib-text-form-block">
                <p id="newsletter-form-description" style="margin: 0;">Subscribe to our Blog and stay updated.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div style="padding: 2px 0;">
            <div class="sib-input sib-form-block">
              <div class="form__entry entry_block">
                <div class="form__label-row ">
                  <label class="entry__label" style="font-weight: 700; font-family:Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size:14px; text-align:left; color:#3c4858;" for="FIRSTNAME" data-required="*">First name</label>
                  <div class="entry__field">
                    <input class="input" maxlength="200" type="text" id="FIRSTNAME" name="FIRSTNAME" autocomplete="given-name" data-required="true" aria-describedby="FIRSTNAME-error" aria-required="true" required />
                  </div>
                </div>
                <label id="FIRSTNAME-error" class="entry__error entry__error--primary" aria-live="polite" style="font-family:Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size:14px; text-align:left; color:#661d1d; background-color:#ffeded; border-color:#ff4949; border-radius:3px;"></label>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div style="padding: 2px 0;">
            <div class="sib-input sib-form-block">
              <div class="form__entry entry_block">
                <div class="form__label-row ">
                  <label class="entry__label" style="font-weight: 700; font-family:Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size:14px; text-align:left; color:#3c4858;" for="LASTNAME" data-required="*">Last name</label>
                  <div class="entry__field">
                    <input class="input" maxlength="200" type="text" id="LASTNAME" name="LASTNAME" autocomplete="family-name" data-required="true" aria-describedby="LASTNAME-error" aria-required="true" required />
                  </div>
                </div>
                <label id="LASTNAME-error" class="entry__error entry__error--primary" aria-live="polite" style="font-family:Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size:14px; text-align:left; color:#661d1d; background-color:#ffeded; border-color:#ff4949; border-radius:3px;"></label>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div style="padding: 2px 0;">
            <div class="sib-input sib-form-block">
              <div class="form__entry entry_block">
                <div class="form__label-row ">
                  <label class="entry__label" style="font-weight: 700; font-family:Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size:14px; text-align:left; color:#3c4858;" for="EMAIL" data-required="*">Email address</label>
                  <div class="entry__field">
                    <input class="input" type="email" id="EMAIL" name="EMAIL" autocomplete="email" value="" placeholder="name@example.com" data-required="true" aria-describedby="EMAIL-help EMAIL-error" aria-required="true" required />
                  </div>
                </div>
                <label id="EMAIL-error" class="entry__error entry__error--primary" aria-live="polite" style="font-family:Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size:14px; text-align:left; color:#661d1d; background-color:#ffeded; border-color:#ff4949; border-radius:3px;"></label>
                <label id="EMAIL-help" class="entry__specification" style="font-family:Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size:11px; text-align:left; color:#8390A4; margin-top: 2px;">
                  For example, abc@xyz.com
                </label>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div style="padding: 4px 0; margin-top: 5px;">
            <div class="sib-form-block" style="text-align: left">
              <button class="sib-form-block__button sib-form-block__button-with-loader" style="font-family:Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:700; text-align:left; color:#FFFFFF; background-color:#0085ca; border-width:0px; border-radius:3px;" form="sib-form" type="submit">
                <svg class="icon clickable__icon progress-indicator__icon sib-hide-loader-icon" viewBox="0 0 512 512" aria-hidden="true">
                  <path d="M460.116 373.846l-20.823-12.022c-5.541-3.199-7.54-10.159-4.663-15.874 30.137-59.886 28.343-131.652-5.386-189.946-33.641-58.394-94.896-95.833-161.827-99.676C261.028 55.961 256 50.751 256 44.352V20.309c0-6.904 5.808-12.337 12.703-11.982 83.556 4.306 160.163 50.864 202.11 123.677 42.063 72.696 44.079 162.316 6.031 236.832-3.14 6.148-10.75 8.461-16.728 5.01z" />
                </svg>
                SUBSCRIBE
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </fieldset>

        <input type="text" name="email_address_check" value="" class="input--hidden" tabindex="-1" autocomplete="off" aria-hidden="true">
        <input type="hidden" name="locale" value="en">
      </form>
    </section>
  </div>
</div>
```

## FIMS User Pathways

```{=html}
<div class="pathway-explorer" data-pathway-root>
  <p id="pathway-instructions">Select a highlighted area of the graphic to update the pathway and view related links below.</p>

  <p id="pathway-status" class="pathway-status visually-hidden" role="status" aria-live="polite">Selected pathway: Overview. Choose a pathway to view related links below.</p>

  <figure class="fims-graphic-container">
    <img id="fims-main-img" src="images/fims-user0.png" alt="Overview of FIMS user pathways">
    <figcaption id="pathway-caption">Overview of FIMS user pathways.</figcaption>

    <button class="hotspot pathway-overlay-button" id="hs-user1" type="button" data-pathway-button data-pathway="user1" data-image="images/fims-user1.png" data-alt="Pathway for Interested" data-label="Interested" data-caption="Pathway for interested FIMS community members." tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></button>
    <button class="hotspot pathway-overlay-button" id="hs-user2" type="button" data-pathway-button data-pathway="user2" data-image="images/fims-user2.png" data-alt="Pathway for New User" data-label="New User" data-caption="Pathway for new FIMS users." tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></button>
    <button class="hotspot pathway-overlay-button" id="hs-user3" type="button" data-pathway-button data-pathway="user3" data-image="images/fims-user3.png" data-alt="Pathway for Power User" data-label="Power User" data-caption="Pathway for experienced FIMS users." tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></button>
    <button class="hotspot pathway-overlay-button" id="hs-user4" type="button" data-pathway-button data-pathway="user4" data-image="images/fims-user4.png" data-alt="Pathway for Contributor" data-label="Contributor" data-caption="Pathway for FIMS contributors." tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></button>
    <button class="hotspot pathway-overlay-button" id="hs-user5" type="button" data-pathway-button data-pathway="user5" data-image="images/fims-user5.png" data-alt="Pathway for Receiver of Results" data-label="Receiver of Results" data-caption="Pathway for receivers of FIMS results." tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></button>

    <a href="https://noaa-fims.github.io/about/faq.html" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-faq-interested" data-show-on="user1" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FAQ page" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://github.com/NOAA-FIMS/FIMS/milestones?sort=due_date&direction=asc" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-planning-interested" data-show-on="user1" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FIMS Project Milestones" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://github.com/orgs/NOAA-FIMS/discussions/801" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-intro-gh-interested" data-show-on="user1" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to Introductions GitHub discussion" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://noaa-fims.github.io/about/calendar.html" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-calendar-interested" data-show-on="user1" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FIMS calendar" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://noaa-fims.github.io/blog/" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-blog-interested" data-show-on="user1" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FIMS blog" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>

    <a href="https://github.com/orgs/NOAA-FIMS/discussions/801" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-intro-gh-newuser" data-show-on="user2" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to Introductions GitHub discussion" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://noaa-fims.github.io/FIMS/articles/fims-demo.html" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-intro-demo-newuser" data-show-on="user2" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FIMS introductory vignette" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://noaa-fims.github.io/resources/packages.html" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-fims-packages-newuser" data-show-on="user2" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FIMS-related packages page" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://noaa-fims.github.io/blog/" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-blog-newuser" data-show-on="user2" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FIMS blog" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://noaa-fims.github.io/about/calendar.html" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-calendar-newuser" data-show-on="user2" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FIMS calendar" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>

    <a href="https://noaa-fims.github.io/FIMS/articles/fims-logging.html" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-advanced-vignettes-poweruser" data-show-on="user3" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to advanced user vignettes" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://github.com/orgs/NOAA-FIMS/discussions/" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-gh-discussions-poweruser" data-show-on="user3" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FIMS GitHub discussions" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://noaa-fims.github.io/resources/packages.html" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-fims-packages-poweruser" data-show-on="user3" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FIMS-related packages page" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://noaa-fims.github.io/about/calendar.html" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-calendar-poweruser" data-show-on="user3" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FIMS calendar" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://noaa-fims.github.io/blog/" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-blog-poweruser" data-show-on="user3" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FIMS blog" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>

    <a href="https://noaa-fims.github.io/FIMS/articles/fims-path-maturity.html" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-contributor-vignettes-contributor" data-show-on="user4" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to developer vignettes" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://github.com/NOAA-FIMS/FIMS/milestones?sort=due_date&direction=asc" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-planning-contributor" data-show-on="user4" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FIMS Project Milestones" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://github.com/orgs/NOAA-FIMS/discussions/" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-gh-discussions-contributor" data-show-on="user4" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FIMS GitHub discussions" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://noaa-fims.github.io/about/calendar.html" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-calendar-contributor" data-show-on="user4" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FIMS calendar" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://noaa-fims.github.io/blog/" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-blog-contributor" data-show-on="user4" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FIMS blog" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>

    <a href="https://noaa-fims.github.io/about/faq.html" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-faq-receiver" data-show-on="user5" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FAQ page" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://github.com/NOAA-FIMS/FIMS/milestones?sort=due_date&direction=asc" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-planning-receiver" data-show-on="user5" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FIMS Project Milestones" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://github.com/orgs/NOAA-FIMS/discussions/801" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-intro-gh-receiver" data-show-on="user5" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to Introductions GitHub discussion" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
    <a href="https://noaa-fims.github.io/blog/" class="hotspot link-hotspot" id="link-blog-receiver" data-show-on="user5" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Go to FIMS blog" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true"></a>
  </figure>

  <div class="pathway-links-panel" aria-labelledby="pathway-links-heading">
    <h3 id="pathway-links-heading">Resources for the selected pathway</h3>
    <p id="pathway-links-help" class="visually-hidden">This list updates when a pathway is selected.</p>
    <ul id="pathway-links-list" class="pathway-links-list" aria-describedby="pathway-links-help"></ul>
  </div>
</div>
```
